privileged_info_summary: The task uses two real-world locations: the White House at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, DC (coordinates 38.897957, -77.036560) and the Empire State Building at 350 Fifth Avenue, New York, NY (coordinates 40.748817, -73.985428). The metadata provides appropriately rounded coordinate values (to 4 decimal places) that match these official locations. The coordinate tolerance of 0.1 degrees equals approximately 11.1 kilometers, which is reasonable for GPS navigation applications.
